chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-121 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 21-05-2025 Syed Zaffar Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. **** While filing comments/objections on behalf of respondents No.4&5, Zahid Ali Khoso, Senior Clerk, Town Committee Kotdiji submits that case of the petitioner is under consideration; however, for that purpose, audit is required. Counsel for petitioner submits that petitioner is ready for such audit, if any. Respondents are directed to complete all the legal formalities, if any, and pay the arrears to the petitioner within 60-days. After such directions, counsel for petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of with above directions. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
